system.description: The only thing better than a good blaster by your side is two good blasters by your side!

benefit.description: After a successful Dodge, you can Riposte using Ranged instead of Melee if the target is within 2 Range Increments so long as you have at least one pistol ready.
benefit.name: Return Fire

finalSecret.description: You can rain fire almost like an automatic weapon. You can use Concentrated Fire, Sweeping Fire, and Suppressing Fire with two pistols. When you do so, you roll damage with a Bonus Die.
finalSecret.name: Deadly Barrage
